description.zh-cn: 营销自动化：基于事件触发的自动化旅程。监听注册成功/下单成功/支付成功等事件，按规则(可设延时)自动给会员发送站内信触达，支持立即或定时(marketing:flow 命令)执行，含触达任务记录与统计。复用通知中心通道。
description.en: Marketing automation: event-triggered journeys. Listens to register/order-placed/order-paid events and sends member notifications by rule (with optional delay), executed immediately or via the marketing:flow command, with job logs and stats. Reuses Notify Center.
